hero.title: Odesa School of Arts №5
hero.subtitle: Your Path to Musical Mastery
hero.story: I come from the year 1938. Or maybe even earlier... I don't even remember anymore. Decades pass, generations change, but there is one thing that remains unchanged — I am always friends with bright, creative people!

departments.description: Today, the school has 6 departments where 335 students study:
departments.additional_info: Over 40 teachers work at our school – true professionals who find an approach to every student and help unlock talent. The educational process takes place in 19 classrooms, filled with music, inspiration, and creativity.

piano.hint: Play using your mouse or keyboard. Hover over the piano to see which computer keys correspond to the notes.

gallery.title: SCHOOL GALLERY
gallery.subtitle: Moments of creative life of our community

about.title: About School
about.p1: Our students and teachers live music and generously share it with others. We constantly perform at various locations in the city — in libraries, the Odesa Zoo, the Union of Journalists of Ukraine — and each such performance becomes a small holiday for the listeners.
about.p2: Young musicians have opened art exhibitions with their performances more than once, adding a special mood and sound to the paintings.
about.p3: And our creativity has also sounded abroad — teachers together with students have already visited Italy twice, where they worthily represented the school and presented Ukrainian music to the European public.
about.p4: And, of course, our students repeatedly return from competitions and festivals with prizes — because behind every performance is talent, hard work, and a great love for art 🎶

history.title: History
history.p1: The first mentions of a children's music school near the Peresyp Bridge date back to 1938. Unfortunately, information about the institution's activities in the pre-war period has not reached our days — archival materials from the 1930s were lost during the evacuation.
history.p2: From 1941 to 1944, the school did not function. However, in November 1944, training was resumed. Later, the institution received the name 'Children's Music School № 5'. Since that time, order books have been kept continuously, which have preserved the history of the school to this day.
history.p3: For decades, talented teachers have worked and are working here, who instill in their students a love for music, form their aesthetic taste and patriotic values. Many graduates continued their education in art institutions and became professional musicians. Today, among the teachers are former students of the school, in particular Kedalova Olena Fedorivna, Lehkodukhova Larysa Vasylivna, Herasymenko Oksana Heorhiivna, Bystrytska Dariia Dmytrivna.
history.p4: The school is actively engaged in concert and educational activities, cooperates with the city's libraries, the Union of Journalists of Ukraine, organizes performances for veterans and socially vulnerable segments of the population.

competitions.title: Competitions
competitions.p1: The school is the founder of creative projects that discover new talents and inspire young artists ✨:
competitions.l1: 🎤 Municipal open festival-competition of young vocalists 'Singing Youth of Odesa' — a bright celebration of voice, where future stars are born.
competitions.l2: 🎼 All-Ukrainian two-round competition of performance mastery 'Modern View' — a platform for creative self-expression and professional growth of young musicians.
competitions.l3: 🧠 'Brain-ring' in theoretical disciplines — an intellectual competition that develops musical thinking, erudition, and a love for music theory.
competitions.p2: These competitions have become an integral part of cultural life, bringing together talented youth and contributing to the development of musical art 🎶.
competitions.p3: In addition to these projects, there are internal competitions in the school: 'What the Music Told', 'What the Music Told Through the Eyes of a Musicologist', 'Singing in Quarantine', 'Playing in Quarantine', 'Singing Star', and others.

admission.title: Admission
admission.p1: Odesa School of Arts № 5 announces recruitment for training! 🎶
admission.p2: Do you dream of learning to play musical instruments, sing, or simply discover creativity in yourself? Then you've come to the right place! Discover the world of the stage and bright emotions. Here they support, inspire, and help unlock talent 💛
admission.p3: For admission, the most important thing is a love for art, curiosity, and a desire to develop. We will teach you everything else.
admission.p4: Not much is needed for enrollment:
admission.p5: Join our creative family — we are waiting for you at the address:
admission.p6: Come — and perhaps here your great creative story will begin ✨
